subjects.heroSentence: This account placed a single $33K bet at roughly 7 percent on “maduro-out-in-2025” and cashed out about $437K. One bet is not statistically improbable on its own — but a lone, outsized, high-conviction long-shot like this, alongside the other signals, is the single-bet insider signature. Consistent with informed trading, not proof of it.
